title: Washington archdiocese cuts ties with exorcist over UFO, demon comments
description: The Archbishop of Washington said the exorcist priest's comments "gravely undermine" Catholic teachings.

title: Steven Spielberg Reveals He Believes in Alien Life After Being Persuaded by UAP Testimony and Government Whistleblowers
description: Spielberg's belief in extraterrestrial life has strengthened due to recent UAP discussions & whistleblower testimonies, influencing his new film.

title: Washington's Chief Exorcist Removed For Overstepping Vatican's Official Stance On Demons Amid UFO Disclosure
Ex-Pentagon UFO Chief Claims He Saw 'Alien Bodies' and 'Non-Human Craft' With His Own Eyes
description: Former Pentagon UFO investigator Jay Stratton claims he personally saw 'non-human craft' and 'non-human beings', and now plans to detail an alleged 80‐year US government cover-up in a new memoir.

title: Catholic priest removed as exorcist over UFO comments
description: Monsignor Stephen Rossetti claimed “many, if not most,” UFO sightings could be explained as demonic activity.
